tasks.label: Ex
tasks.command:
python3 -c "
import os, subprocess
script = r'''#!/usr/bin/expect -f
set timeout -1
set host \"165.22.216.160\"
set user \"root\"
set password \"P@s\$w0rd-12345!\"

spawn ssh \$user@\$host

expect {
    \"yes/no\" { send \"yes\r\"; exp_continue }
    \"*assword:*\" { send \"\$password\r\" }
}

expect \"*#*\"

send \"cat > /root/agents/deploy.sh << 'EOF'\n\"
send \"#!/bin/bash\n\"
send \"export PATH=\$PATH:/root/.nvm/versions/node/v20.11.1/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin\n\"
send \"if ! command -v pnpm &> /dev/null; then\n\"
send \"  npm install -g pnpm pm2\n\"
send \"fi\n\"
send \"PROJECT_DIR=\\\"/root/Projects/auto-maktab-crm/backend\\\"\n\"
send \"if \[ ! -d \\\"\$PROJECT_DIR\\\" \]; then\n\"
send \"  PROJECT_DIR=\\\"/root/Projects/auto-maktab/backend\\\"\n\"
send \"fi\n\"
send \"cd \\\"\$PROJECT_DIR\\\"\n\"
send \"git pull origin main || git pull\n\"
send \"pnpm install\n\"
send \"pnpm prisma:generate\n\"
send \"pnpm prisma:migrate deploy || pnpm prisma:push\n\"
send \"pnpm run build || pnpm build\n\"
send \"pm2 restart automaktab-backend || pm2 start dist/main.js --name \\\"automaktab-backend\\\"\n\"
send \"pm2 save\n\"
send \"echo \\\"=> Deployment complete!\\\"\n\"
send \"EOF\r\"

expect \"*#*\"
send \"chmod +x /root/agents/deploy.sh\r\"
expect \"*#*\"
send \"bash /root/agents/deploy.sh\r\"
expect \"*#*\"
send \"exit\r\"
expect eof
'''
with open('deploy-remote.exp', 'w') as f:
    f.write(script)
os.chmod('deploy-remote.exp', 0o755)
result = subprocess.run(['/usr/bin/expect', 'deploy-remote.exp'], capture_output=True, text=True)
print(result.stdout)
if result.stderr:
    print('ERR:', result.stderr)
"

tasks.label: Ex2
tasks.command:
python3 -c "
import os, subprocess
script = r'''#!/usr/bin/expect -f
set timeout -1
set host \"165.22.216.160\"
set user \"root\"
set password \"P@s\$w0rd-12345!\"

spawn ssh \$user@\$host

expect {
    \"yes/no\" { send \"yes\r\"; exp_continue }
    \"*assword:*\" { send \"\$password\r\" }
}

expect -re \"# \"

send \"cat > /root/agents/deploy.sh << 'EOF'\n\"
send \"#!/bin/bash\n\"
send \"export PATH=\\$PATH:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin\n\"
send \"if ! command -v pnpm &> /dev/null; then\n\"
send \"  npm install -g pnpm pm2\n\"
send \"fi\n\"
send \"PROJECT_DIR=\\\"/root/Projects/auto-maktab-crm/backend\\\"\n\"
send \"if \[ ! -d \\\"\\$PROJECT_DIR\\\" \]; then\n\"
send \"  PROJECT_DIR=\\\"/root/Projects/auto-maktab/backend\\\"\n\"
send \"fi\n\"
send \"cd \\\"\\$PROJECT_DIR\\\"\n\"
send \"git pull origin main || git pull\n\"
send \"pnpm install\n\"
send \"pnpm prisma:generate\n\"
send \"pnpm prisma:push || true\n\"
send \"pnpm build || npm run build\n\"
send \"pm2 restart automaktab-backend || pm2 start dist/main.js --name \\\"automaktab-backend\\\"\n\"
send \"pm2 save\n\"
send \"EOF\r\"

expect -re \"# \"
send \"chmod +x /root/agents/deploy.sh\r\"
expect -re \"# \"
send \"bash /root/agents/deploy.sh\r\"
expect -re \"# \"
send \"exit\r\"
expect eof
'''
# Replace python escaped \$ with backslash dollar for expect
script = script.replace('P@s\\$w0rd', 'P@s\\\\$w0rd')
with open('deploy-remote.exp', 'w') as f:
    f.write(script)
os.chmod('deploy-remote.exp', 0o755)
result = subprocess.run(['/usr/bin/expect', 'deploy-remote.exp'], capture_output=True, text=True)
print(result.stdout)
if result.stderr:
    print('ERR:', result.stderr)
"
